prompt: Which vulnerability is most likely present in this code?
explanation: A user-controlled value (`next`) is used as a redirect target, so a link to your site can bounce the victim to `evil.com` for phishing — Open Redirect (CWE-601). The near-miss is SSRF: there the *server* fetches the URL; here the *browser* is told to navigate. Fix: redirect only to an allow-list of internal paths.
